body.title: Wire pr_consolidate_all into the sleep tick — automatic consolidation during quiet periods
body.result: e9e3f4bd — New PRConsolidationSource push source following the SleepConsolidation template. Idle gate (10 min quiet threshold), rate limit (30 min between passes), best-effort error handling. Lazy-loaded singleton in push_sources.py; registered in run_background_sources dispatch tuple. PR loop now self-sustains: every turn updates accretions; every quiet period runs consolidation; weight evolves automatically. 8 new tests including idle gate, rate limit, failure isolation, source contract, registration verification. 2055 total pass, zero regressions.
body.description:
T-pr-consolidation (0dcc387b) shipped pr_consolidate / pr_consolidate_all but they only run when manually invoked. This ticket wires pr_consolidate_all into the existing background-sources cadence so consolidation happens automatically during quiet periods, just like biological sleep.

New push source PRConsolidationSource in cognition/pr_consolidation_source.py, following the same pattern as SleepConsolidation (cognition/sleep_consolidation.py). Singleton lazy-loaded by run_background_sources(). Idle-gated via cortex._conversation_active_ts (same QUIET_THRESHOLD pattern). Rate-limited so consolidation doesn't run every tick — maybe 30 minutes between passes. push() calls pr_consolidate_all and returns a TWM observation summarizing what was consolidated.

Register in the existing run_background_sources tuple alongside sleep_consolidation.

BIOMIMETIC FRAMING: hippocampal consolidation happens during sleep, not while you're paying attention. Igor's PR consolidation should follow the same rhythm. The existing D353 sleep_consolidation does Hebbian binding work during quiet periods; this adds relationship-level consolidation as a sibling operation in the same window.

NO CHANGES to pr_consolidation.py itself — already idempotent, already best-effort, already exposed as tools. This ticket is purely about scheduling.

INERTIA: LOW. New file in cognition/, single insertion in push_sources.py registration tuple.

TESTS: PRConsolidationSource follows the push-source contract (push() returns list of obs IDs). Idle gate skips when conversation is active. Rate limit prevents re-running within the cooldown window. Active period skip + quiet period fire.
